info.name: GearUp Backend API
info.description:
StartFragmentGearUp is a backend API for renting sports and outdoor gear.  
Roles:  
1\. Customer  
2\. Provider  
3\. Admin  
  
Base URL:  
http://localhost:5000EndFragment
